=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 2/24/03, Wellington, 2CDR

Taper and lineage:no info
Great sound


CD1
1 Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum, (Bob on piano, Larry & Billy on Telecasters, Tony on electric bass), 2 I'll Be Your Baby Tonight, (Bob on piano & harp, Larry on pedal steel, Billy on Telecaster, Tony on electric bass), 3 Highway 61 Revisited, (Bob on piano, Larry & Billy on Telecasters, Tony on electric bass), 4 Lay, Lady, Lay, (Bob on piano and harp, Larry on pedal steel, Billy on Telecaster, Tony on electric bass), 5 Things Have Changed, (Bob on piano, Larry on Stratocaster, Billy on Telecaster, Tony on electric bass), 6 Drifter's Escape, (Bob on Strat & harp, Larry on Strat, Billy on Telecaster, Tony on electric bass),7 My Back Pages (acoustic) (Larry on violin), 8 Desolation Row (acoustic), 9 Don't Think Twice, It's All Right (acoustic), 10 It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding) (acoustic), (Bob on piano, Larry on cittern, Billy on acoustic guitar, Tony on standup bass), 11 Positively 4th Street, (Bob on Stratocaster, Larry & Billy on Telecasters, Tony on electric bass),

CD2
1 Honest With Me, (Bob on piano, Larry on slide guitar, Billy on Telecaster, Tony on electric bass), 2 Floater (Too Much To Ask), (Bob on piano, Larry on semi-acoustic Gretch, Billy on semi-acoustic Gibson, Tony on standup bass), 3 Summer Days, (Bob on piano, Larry on semi-acoustic Gretch, Billy on Telecaster, Tony on standup bass), (encore), 4 Like A Rolling Stone, (Bob on Stratocaster, Larry on Telecaster, Billy on semi-acoustic Gibson, Tony on electric bass), 5 All Along The Watchtower, (Bob on stratocaster, Larry & Billy on Telecasters, Tony on electric bass) 



Concert # 1500 of The Never-Ending Tour.
Concert # 10 of the 2003 Tour Down Under. 2003 concert # 10.
Concert # 10 with the 15th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), Bill Burnette (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), George Receli (drums & percussion).

7-10 acoustic with the band.
1-5, 10, 12-14 Bob Dylan (piano).
2, 4, 6  Bob Dylan (harmonica).
2, 4 Larry Campbell (pedal steel guitar).
7 Larry Campbell (violin).
9, 10 Larry Campbell (cittern).
12 Larry Campbell (slide guitar).

Note. Bob Dylan played this venue 10 September 1998.
8 new songs (50%) compared to previous concert. 5 new songs for this tour.
